hooks.command: echo 'ZUKAN ACTIVE — vault workflow mode. Route every user message per CLAUDE.md routing table (daily/devlog/mindstorm/project-idea/recall/weekly) — messages themselves are triggers, no command needed. KIROKU ON by default: log state changes (decisions+why, builds, ships, milestones) at checkpoints into daily + project changelogs + area observations; commit each checkpoint; off only on "stop kiroku".'
echo 'ZUKAN: route message per CLAUDE.md table if vault content. KIROKU ON: log state changes at checkpoints.'
